close_reason: Removed monolithic TSL key (layout_monolithic) from persistence_phase.ex and system_keys.ex. Commit 01308944.
description:
## Summary

Remove the monolithic TSL key from coordinator persistence. Ephemeral PIDs were already removed from decomposed system keys in commit 8065bbdc.

## Current State

- Decomposed keys (layout_services, layout_id, layout_log, shard_keys) no longer contain ephemeral PIDs
- The monolithic key (`layout_monolithic()`) still stores encoded full TSL for legacy/handoff
- No backward compatibility is needed

## Files to Modify

**persistence_phase.ex** (line 86)
- Remove `Tx.set(SystemKeys.layout_monolithic(), ...)` call

**system_keys.ex** (lines 140-141, 195)
- Remove `layout_monolithic/0` function
- Remove from legacy keys list

**coordinator/** (if any reads)
- Check if coordinator reads the monolithic key during handoff/recovery
- Remove any reads if present

## Verification

- Recovery still works without monolithic key
- Coordinator handoff still works (or is removed if unused)
- All tests pass
title: Coordinator stores only log identities (mini-TSL)
